name: Live Studio
author: Ramón Sesma
description: A modular 'super-extension' for Ableton Live 12 that bundles many production modules behind a tabbed webview with a command palette and a bring-your-own-key AI copilot supporting several providers. Includes panels such as a piano roll, mixer, step sequencer, and EQ curves, plus in-host audio analysis like the FFT-based Resonance Mix Radar; requires Live 12.4.5b+.
